svg.text: Ten custom bindings · reserved Control + Option + Command family
Round 1–3: Command / Agents / Skills · Round 5: Create · Round 6: Operate · Round 7: Personal · Round 8: Quick Text
Fn+5 empty · Fn+6 Fast · Voice, Dictate, and Plan remain on the Command touchscreen
Right squares: A Personal · B Agents · C Quick Text · D Skills · Fn layer · E Decline
Fn+A Reasoning Up · Fn+C Reasoning Down · Fn+Round 7 Approve
